feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Blog in Awaiting Review
entry.content: How long it will take for moderators to approve the blog. My blog is in Awaiting Review for more than a week

entry.title: SAP Community issues when posting new blogs
entry.content:
Dear Community colleagues,

I encountered the following issues when posting blogs in https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/bg-p/erp-blog-sap

  • SAP Managed Tags can't be saved and need enter again in case you need to re-edit a blog;
  • Loading performance is too bad when create or re-edit a blog which is not user-friendly for blogger;
  • Part of blog content can't be saved , example: if hyperlink is the start of the line of a blog, it will remove it and not to be saved which could be a bug;

Can anyone double check these issues?

Thanks in advance!

Br Bob

entry.title: How does your personality influence the way you approach problem-solving in SAP projects?
entry.content:
Do you think your personality plays a role in how you approach problem-solving in SAP projects? For instance, analytical individuals might rely heavily on data and logic to troubleshoot, while creative thinkers might look for out-of-the-box solutions. Collaborative personalities may focus on teamwork to resolve issues, whereas independent personalities might dive deep into self-research.

In your experience with SAP, have you noticed how your unique traits influence your workflow, learning style, or the way you tackle challenges? I'd love to hear how personality impacts the way you use SAP tools and collaborate within teams!

entry.title: Archiving DBTABLOG, lot of POWL_SELCRIT records
entry.content:
We are in process of doing Archiving of DBTABLOG, and I can see that the majority of records are related to POWL_SELCRIT.

Is there any reason to keep those archives, or can we just delete the archive related to POWL_SELCRIT table in DBTABLOG.

Should we just turn off logging for POWL_SELCRIT?

entry.title: Deleting Blog Post
entry.content:
Hello,

how can I delete an already published blog post?

thanks.

br Conny

entry.title: Where are my blogs I have linkedin my IDs and now what I have is a new id with no historical data
entry.content:
PL advise where are my previous blogs , posts, questions etc

Why do SAP have to keep changing something that works

entry.title: SAP BTP Cockpit free trail account - error "Service" broker
entry.content:
I am encountering an issue when attempting to execute the boost, which consistently fails with the following error message:

Service broker error: "Service" broker apimanagement-apiportal-trial failed with: "Forbidden"

In addition to this, I have attempted the following troubleshooting steps:

  1. Manually creating an instance of the service.
  2. Re-creating the sub-account associated with the service.

Unfortunately, neither of these approaches resolved the issue, and the error persists.

Does anyone happen to know what it could be?

entry.title: Apache Tomcat 9.0.98
entry.content:
hi everyone, can i know Apache Tomcat 9.0.98 or 97 is supporting/compatible with SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.2 Support Pack 8 Patch 12 (Version: 14.2.8.3978)?

or is there any website/link i can refer the compatibility.

entry.title: Improve Community 2024 feed to append "and X other people" to "mentioned you"
entry.content:
In my Notification feed, I receive messages like this:

In fact, the message targets a bunch of people, so it's not really a message targeting me specifically:

Is it possible to change the message "@mentioned you in" to "@mentioned you and 11 other people in"?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: How to influence Community 2024 developments?
entry.content:
Is there an official way to contact SAP Community to ask for some fixes or improvements of https://community.sap.com? Right now, I'm posting them at Questions about SAP Websites | SAP Community, hoping that SAP people are looking at it...

I couldn't find any "SAP Community" group at https://influence.sap.com.

EDIT: posting to Questions about SAP Websites | SAP Community seems the right path, as can be inferred from these two replies by @AnnePetteroe: Improve Community 2024 feed to append "and X other... - SAP Community and Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", ins... - SAP Community.

entry.title: Purchase requisition 20000010, item 00010, not approved for ordering
entry.content:
Hi Guru's,

I'm Getting this error while converting PR to PO, I have not completely configured flexible workflow for PR but still getting this error.

entry.title: Reforma tributária Brasil - Atualizações ERP
entry.content:
Boa tarde, Pessoal.

Gostaria  de uma ajuda , sou novo por aqui, já existem alguns fóruns específicos, que estejam fazendo estudos sobre as mudanças de processos e sistema ERP para atender a reforma tributária na SAP?

Como faço para ser incluído neste fóruns?

entry.title: Consecuences of activating obsolete REPORTS? Is there any casuistics about it?
entry.content:
Greetings community,

As you know, in ECC, the transaction F.75/F_75 exists (and still works) and is considered obsolete in the S4H environment. However, there's a procedure that can be used to reactivate it, even though SAP clearly states that they won't be responsible for any system crashes that occur as a result of reactivating obsolete programs.

The question is: If a company executes this report, what tangible error has actually been reported due to activating this or, in general, any other obsolete REPORT?

Thanks for your comments!

entry.title: Cost centre creation?
entry.content: Can we create a cost centre without assigning to any Business Area in creation screen [ s4 hana ]? I want to create a cost centre for Finance Department and I do not want to link this to any busines area in cost centre creation screen because finance department expenses belongs to many business area .but here it is compulsory to select a business area.

entry.title: VA00 price condtion didn't show 2 items althought choose 2 characters
entry.content:
Hi Gays

I was confused with the variant price showing up in SO, although I chose 2 variants in SO, VA00 variant price had been maintained in VK11, but in SO, only shows the first variant's value in conditions sheet. 

there are two characters: 1. bread,  2. sauce.  check-in  "condition"  button, only show 1  and price VA00 ONLY show 1 for bread value in "condition" sheet. 

why?  I suppose it will show 2 value.

Would you please help me? is this issue a system issue?  What can I do?

Thanks a lot!

Grace

entry.title: Unable to purchase SAP certification exam
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I've prepared for a couple of SAP certifications and wanted to purchase CER006 subscription for 6 SAP certification attempts. Unfortunately, on training.sap.com , I get to page for CER006 but I'm unable to find the book/purchase option. CER006 - SAP Certification Exam, Six Attempts | SAP Training

I've tried multiple browsers, cleared cache etc. Just to test my ID, I tried booking a random course and there I do get option to book but just not for CER006(or CER001)

Has anyone faced similar issues. Ant help on how to go about this would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,

AMRITA

entry.title: Post checks after RKS(Rolling Kernel Switch).
entry.content:
Hi There, 

Can anyone please help me with the list of post checks after the RKS is done.

Regards
Avin

entry.title: SAP Router (seclogin: Can't add credentials)
How to link to another section within same blog
entry.content:
Hi,

I am writing a blog and would like to add a link in the blog to another section within same blog post. 

I have already tried How to Add an Anchor Link to Jump to a Specific Part of a Page via HTML mode, it gives me an error and removes the ID created against the section header. 

Looking forward for a response.

thanks

entry.title: /SCWM/RWEIGHT_VOLUME_UPDATE in Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are getting dump, ASSERTION_FAILED when confirming Warehouse tasks. This is in our Test system but we also received it in our Customizing system.

I have found the same issue in on-prem/private cloud through OSS notes to run SE38 /SCWM/RWEIGHT_VOLUME_UPDATE. Unfortunately, this doesn't seem available in Public. 

The specific line of code failing seems to be related to weight. We have not adjusted weight since initial upload.

IF ls_capa-weight IS NOT INITIAL.
ASSERT <dlagp>-unit_w = ls_capa-unit_w.

 

Has anyone faced this issue?
